dashboard.title: Agency Command Center
dashboard.description: Manage today's tasks, content, campaigns, provider setup, and publishing readiness from one place.
dashboard.noPublishAttempts: No publish attempts yet. Provider actions and scheduled attempts will appear after they run.
dashboard.newCampaignPrompt: Create a new campaign or review provider setup when you are ready for the next move.
dashboard.addApiKeyQuota: Add API key and confirm quota.
dashboard.addNvidiaKey: Add NVIDIA_API_KEY if fallback generation is required.
dashboard.reviewMetaPage: Review selected Page, Instagram account, scopes, and Ad Account.
dashboard.connectMeta: Connect Meta and select publishing targets.
dashboard.confirmGoogleAds: Confirm customer ID and developer token approval before paused drafts.
dashboard.completeGoogleOauth: Complete OAuth, customer ID, and developer token setup.
dashboard.boardSelected: Board selected. Verify OAuth remains connected.
dashboard.connectPinterest: Connect Pinterest and select a board.
dashboard.manualOnlyLinkedIn: Manual-only copy workflow until real LinkedIn OAuth/publishing is implemented.
dashboard.jumpToWorkspace: Jump straight to the workspace that needs your attention.
dashboard.noSecretsShown: No secret values are shown. Use Settings to fix provider setup gaps.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage workspace details, brand identity, appearance, providers, publishing readiness, security, backups, and advanced safeguards.

workspaceCard.description: Account details connected to the current workspace.
workspaceCard.preferencesSavedDesc: Local dashboard preferences were saved in this browser.

brandKitCard.title: Brand Kit
brandKitCard.description: Keep the offer, audience, tone, hashtags, and CTA consistent before generating new content.

providersCard.title: Providers
providersCard.description: Setup status for AI, social, ads, GitHub, scheduler, and storage providers. Secret values are never displayed.
providersCard.setupDescription: Covers key-based AI provider setup alongside Meta, Google Ads, Pinterest, and LinkedIn OAuth flows.
providersCard.openaiBillingNotice: If OpenAI billing or quota is exceeded, auto mode can fall back to NVIDIA NIM when NVIDIA is configured. Image generation remains OpenAI-only in this phase.

appearanceCard.title: Appearance & Theme
appearanceCard.description: Tune colors, background, logo, and card readability. Use reset controls when the interface becomes too busy.

rolesCard.title: Roles & Permissions
rolesCard.description: Review owner, admin, operator, editor, and viewer access before changing sensitive controls.

publishingCard.title: Publishing & Scheduling
publishingCard.description: Review publishing platform readiness and scheduled execution environment.

securityCard.title: Security
securityCard.description: Review workspace isolation, RLS, file upload controls, and token safety.

backupsCard.title: Backups
backupsCard.description: Safe workspace exports for manual download. No automatic database writes.

alexCard.title: Alex Assistant / OpenAI
alexCard.description: Personal AI assistant for the agency manager. Uses OpenAI server-side only.

productionChecklist.title: Production Launch Checklist
productionChecklist.description: Run through these steps before going live with paid ads, real publishing, and client-facing features.

n8nCard.title: n8n Scheduler / Workflow Automation
n8nCard.description: n8n scheduling and workflow automation status for task execution, content publishing, and campaign operations.
n8nCard.n8nDescription: When connected, approved content items, scheduled posts, task callbacks, and campaign drafts are sent to n8n for real execution.
n8nCard.setupN8n: To activate n8n, set N8N_WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_API_KEY in your Vercel environment variables.

aiReadiness.title: AI Provider Readiness
aiReadiness.description: Active provider, key status, base URL, model, test path, and safe messages without exposing secrets.

contentStudio.title: Content & Ads Studio
contentStudio.description: Create cross-channel drafts, link creative assets, and use provider actions that either execute for real or explain the exact setup gap.
contentStudio.googleAdsApprovalRequired: Google Ads approval requirements still apply
contentStudio.publishSendRunServerSide: Publish and provider send actions run server-side when the provider is ready. Scheduled items are picked up by the secure cron route after their planned time.
contentStudio.schedulerEnvMessage: Add CRON_SECRET in the server environment, configure Vercel Cron, and redeploy after env changes.
contentStudio.googleAdsDraftExplanation: Google Ads campaign draft creation needs an approved developer token and a connected customer account. If either is missing, the action will explain it exactly.
contentStudio.pinterestDraftExplanation: Pinterest pins can be drafted here, but provider setup is incomplete.

creativeAssets.title: Creative Assets
creativeAssets.description: Generate reusable image prompts now and keep OpenAI image generation ready for server-side setup.
creativeAssets.assetLibraryDesc: Workspace-scoped creative prompts, generated images, and future placement links.
creativeAssets.imageSetupMessage: Add OPENAI_API_KEY in Vercel to enable real image generation.
creativeAssets.noAssetsDesc: Create a prompt-ready creative asset for Reels, campaigns, thumbnails, stories, or ads.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Organize your software projects, SaaS products, campaigns, tasks, releases, and next actions from one workspace.

promptLibrary.title: Prompt Library
promptLibrary.description: Save, organize, search, and reuse your best prompts for development, deployment, automation, ads, reports, and project workflows.
promptLibrary.safetyMessage: Do not store API keys, tokens, passwords, authorization headers, or private credentials in prompts.

releases.title: Releases
releases.description: Track phases, deployments, build results, testing checklists, and rollback notes for AgentFlow AI.

systemHealth.title: System Health
systemHealth.description: Monitor providers, storage, scheduling, publishing readiness, project setup, and operational blockers from one place.
systemHealth.alexReady: Alex is ready. Open Alex to chat.
systemHealth.missingAddEnv: Missing. Add in Vercel Environment Variables.
systemHealth.backupCenterDesc: Create sanitized JSON and Markdown workspace exports. Secrets, provider tokens, raw env values, task execution credentials, and binary asset files are excluded.

security.title: Security Center
security.description: Review authentication, workspace isolation, RLS, file uploads, secrets, tokens, AI safety, scheduler protection, headers, audit logging, and build safety.
security.scoreDescription: This score is based only on checks the app can verify from code, migrations, runtime workspace access, and safe configuration presence. Unknown items are marked Needs Review.
security.checklistDesc: OWASP-inspired defensive checks. Needs Review means the app cannot fully verify the control automatically.
security.groupedChecklist: Grouped checklist for authentication, authorization, RLS, files, secrets, AI, GitHub, scheduler, headers, logging, and build safety.
security.backupSecurityDesc: Backup Center availability and export safety controls.
security.issuesDesc: Findings from static code checks, migration review, runtime workspace checks, and safe configuration checks. Secret values are never shown.
security.owaspDesc: Guidance alignment only. This is not an OWASP certification or penetration test.
security.backupAvailableDesc: Safe workspace exports are available at /dashboard/backups.
security.secretsExcludedDesc: Tokens, API keys, and credentials are excluded from exports.
security.restoreDisabledDesc: This phase performs no restore writes to the database.
security.securityMisconfigurationDesc: Security headers, env presence checks, cron protection.
security.supplyChainDesc: Build checks and dependency audit recommendation.
security.cryptographicFailuresDesc: Token encryption readiness and no secret exposure in UI.
security.injectionDesc: Server action validation and upload allowlists.
security.loggingAlertingDesc: Audit log table migration and publish/scheduler logs.
security.noIssues: No issues detected by current checks.
security.manualReview: Continue manual review before major production changes.
security.authRequired: Authentication and an active workspace are required.
security.internalReviewNotice: This page is an internal defensive review center aligned with selected OWASP Top 10 and ASVS-style verification controls. It does not claim full compliance or certification.

backups.title: Backup Center
backups.description: Create safe workspace backups for projects, prompts, releases, content, settings, and operational data.
backups.safetyMessage: This center exports sanitized workspace data only. It does not restore, overwrite, delete, deploy, run tasks, touch provider publishing, change scheduler logic, export env values, include binary files, or expose tokens/secrets.
backups.backupHistoryDesc: Only metadata and summaries are stored. Old full backup JSON files are not stored in the database.
backups.restorePreviewDesc: Restoring backups is intentionally disabled in this phase.
backups.noBackupsCreatedDesc: Create a backup to generate an immediate JSON download and save a metadata-only history row.
backups.restoreNotEnabled: Restoring backups is not enabled yet to avoid accidental overwrites. This Backup Center currently supports safe export and reference backups only.

safePatchPlanner.title: Safe Patch Planner
safePatchPlanner.description: Plan code changes safely before implementation. Review affected files, risks, tests, and rollback steps before sending prompts to Codex.
safePatchPlanner.planningMessage: This planner does not modify repository files, write to GitHub, create pull requests, deploy, run task execution, publish provider content, or expose secrets.
safePatchPlanner.howToUsePrompt: How to use the generated prompt
safePatchPlanner.howToUseMessage: Copy the Codex implementation prompt only after the approval checklist is reviewed. Keep the implementation scope narrow, verify with lint/typecheck/build, and keep the no-touch systems intact.

softwarePlanner.title: Software Planner
softwarePlanner.description: Turn a software idea into an architecture plan, MVP scope, route map, schema draft, testing checklist, deployment checklist, and pending task drafts.
softwarePlanner.planningMessage: The planner does not generate repository files, push commits, create pull requests, deploy, publish provider content, or run task execution automatically.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Read system alerts, task updates, provider setup messages, scheduler results, and publishing activity.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Track publishing readiness, content performance, provider status, and workflow activity.
reports.healthSummaryDesc: Operational health score and top next actions from the System Health Center.
reports.publishingStatusDesc: Visual summary of real Content Studio item states.
reports.providerReadinessDesc: Current provider status and next safe action. No credentials are displayed.
reports.schedulerSummaryDesc: Execution status from scheduled Content Studio records.
reports.taskReviewDesc: Workflow activity from real task and review records.
reports.guardrailsDesc: This dashboard is operational reporting, not inferred ad performance.
reports.setupChecklistDesc: Environment and provider setup are reported as present, missing, needs review, or approval pending. Values are never shown.
reports.recentReportsDesc: Copy-ready summaries generated from current workspace data. Saved task reports are counted when available.
reports.noFakeMetricsDesc: Impressions, clicks, spend, revenue, and conversions are not shown without real provider metrics.
reports.noSecretsExposedDesc: Tokens, secrets, authorization headers, and credential fields are filtered from summaries.
reports.noProviderActionsDesc: Reports observe readiness and attempts only; publishing and scheduling flows are unchanged.
reports.noPublishAttemptsDesc: Create or schedule content from Content & Ads Studio to start tracking operational activity.
reports.linkedUnlinkedAssets: Linked, unlinked, image, and video assets

recovery.title: Recovery Center
recovery.description: Find failed, blocked, setup-required, approval-pending, and manual-only items in one place.

fixSteps.waitGoogleAds: Wait for Google Ads developer token approval.
fixSteps.verifyOAuth: Open Provider Setup to verify OAuth and customer account selection.
fixSteps.waitApproval: Wait for platform approval or complete the provider review requirement.
fixSteps.copyPackage: Copy the package from the content item.
fixSteps.manualHandoff: Publish or hand off manually outside AgentFlow AI.
fixSteps.openContentItem: Open the content item and use the copy-ready package.
fixSteps.reconnectProvider: Reconnect the provider in Provider Setup.
fixSteps.addQuota: Add quota or credits for the AI/provider account.
fixSteps.useManualWorkflow: Open the item and use the copy-ready manual workflow.
fixSteps.verifyApproval: Open Provider Setup and verify approval/account state.
fixSteps.resolveBlocker: Open the content item or provider setup to resolve the blocker.
fixSteps.fixMedia: Open Creative Assets and fix missing public media.
fixSteps.reviewScheduler: Review scheduled item readiness and existing scheduler controls.
fixSteps.resolveAccountToken: Open Provider Setup and resolve account/token/approval blockers.
fixSteps.linkVideoAsset: Link a public video asset to this Reel.
fixSteps.linkImageAsset: Link a public image asset to this item.
fixSteps.useUploadedImage: Use a public uploaded image asset before retrying.
fixSteps.addOpenAiQuota: Add OpenAI quota/credits or use NVIDIA fallback.
fixSteps.addNvidiaKey: Add NVIDIA API key or credits if fallback generation is required.
fixSteps.configureScheduler: Configure scheduler environment and Vercel Cron.
fixSteps.addOpenAiKey: Add OPENAI_API_KEY in Vercel Environment Variables.

alex.title: Alex Assistant
alex.description: Personal AI assistant for your agency workspace
alex.placeholder: Ask Alex anything about your agency...
alex.footerWarning: Do not paste API keys, tokens, passwords, or private credentials.
alex.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm Alex, your personal agency assistant. How can I help you today?
alex.apiKeyMissingMessage: OpenAI API key is missing. Add OPENAI_API_KEY in Vercel Environment Variables.
alex.chatCleared: Chat cleared. How can I help you?
alex.errorMessage: I encountered an error. Please try again or check system health.
alex.connectionErrorMessage: I encountered a connection error. Please try again.

contentLibrary.title: Content Library
contentLibrary.description: Manage saved Content & Ads Studio items separately from the creation workspace. Filter drafts, inspect readiness, and reopen the right platform studio.
contentLibrary.emptyTitle: No content items match this library view
contentLibrary.emptyDesc: Create a platform draft in Content & Ads Studio, then return here to manage saved items, linked assets, provider status, and planned times.

review.title: Reviews
review.description: Review a real task from the active Supabase workspace.
review.descriptionList: Review real tasks marked needs_review in the active workspace.
review.notWaitingForReview: Task is not waiting for review
review.notWaitingMessage: This task is currently {status}. Review actions are only available for tasks marked needs_review.
review.taskContextDesc: Real task details from the active Supabase workspace.
review.storedResultDesc: Only real result data from Supabase is shown.
review.reviewHistoryDesc: Saved ratings and feedback for this task.
review.reviewDecisionDesc: Approve this task or request changes with feedback.
review.decisionUnavailable: Review actions are unavailable for the current task status.
review.notFoundDesc: The selected task is not available in the active workspace.
review.noResultYetDesc: Run the task to store a result before review.
review.noTasksWaitingDesc: Open Tasks to find work that needs follow-up.
review.noActionAvailableDesc: Only tasks with needs_review status can be approved or sent back.

calendar.planningOnlyMessage: Scheduled items are labeled as planned. Provider setup gaps, approval pending states, and failures stay visible here without implying a publish will happen.
calendar.noScheduledItems: No scheduled items on this day
calendar.noCalendarItemsDesc: Schedule content from Content Studio to see it here.

docs.title: Docs
docs.description: AgentFlow AI operations guide to understand agents, tasks, content, ads, reports, and projects.
docs.noResultsDesc: Try another word or choose a different category.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
